name: LibraryPicker
description: Modal-or-sheet media picker — pick from a library or drag-drop upload. DS SearchField + section tabs + type select + filter popover over a MediaGrid masonry; a full-width upload band under the filters collapses on scroll. Single/multi-select. Desktop = React-Aria Modal (two-row toolbar 640–1200px); mobile = vaul bottom-sheet. Props-driven (Convex-agnostic).
